title: AppEvent fields inconsistently typed: destroyed uses Id, other IDs use String
description: AppEvent::ChatsDelta.destroyed is now Vec<jmap_chat::jmap::Id> but all other ID-shaped fields in AppEvent remain String: SessionReady.account_id, MessagesLoaded.chat_id, TypingIndicator.chat_id/sender_id, PresenceUpdate.contact_id. A contributor adding a new event variant has no clear guidance on which type to use. This also means the type boundary between jmap-chat (which uses Id throughout) and jmap-chat-egui (which uses String for most IDs) is now inconsistent rather than systematic. Either upgrade all AppEvent ID fields to Id, or revert destroyed back to String and add a comment explaining the boundary is intentional.
close_reason: Design decision: AppEvent is a String boundary layer. All event ID fields use String; Id→String conversion happens at event construction in client_task.rs. Added boundary comment to AppEvent enum documenting this.
